arts.ttl: Lopetegui names unchanged team to face Arsenal
arts.sum: West Ham United: Fabiański, Wan-Bissaka, Todibo, Kilman, Emerson, Soler, Souček, Paquetá, Summerville, Bowen ©, Antonio Alongside Álvarez and Mayers on the bench will be goalkeeper Alphonse Areola, defenders Vladimír Coufal and Ollie Scarles, midfielders Guido Rodríguez, Andy Irving, Luis Guilherme and forward Danny Ings.

arts.ttl: Team News: Jorginho and Trossard start
arts.sum: Arsenal: Raya, Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Calafiori, Jorginho, Rice, Odegaard, Saka, Trossard, Havertz. From the starting XI that beat Sporting 5-1 in Lisbon on Tuesday, in come Jorginho and Leandro Trossard, with Thomas Partey and Gabriel Martinelli missing out.

arts.ttl: West Ham United v Arsenal: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 5.30pm GMT kick-off Live scoreboard | And feel free to drop Emillia an email Hello, good evening and welcome to coverage of West Ham’s Premier League clash with Arsenal. Julen Lopetegui earned himself a lifeline on Monday when his team cruised to a shock 2-0 win over Newcastle at St James’ Park. It was the club’s first victory in just under a month, giving them some breathing space between the likes of Leicester and Everton. Meanwhile, Arsenal have returned to fine form following the international break. Mikel Arteta and his players endured a rough patch between the end of October and the start of November, but Martin Ødegaard’s return to full fitness has provided a huge boost. The North London side earned a 3-0 win over Nottingham Forest last weekend followed by a 5-1 victory against Sporting Lisbon on Tuesday, so they should be oozing confidence going into this London derby. Continue reading...

Bukayo Saka responds as Arsenal exit announced and 'new adventure' confirmed
arts.sum: Announcing the news on Instagram, Solan shared a team photo involving dozens of players and staff with the caption "This gang," punctuated with a red heart emoji. Arsene Wenger and the club's long-time head of performance, Shad Forsythe, afforded Solan, a performance specialist for the Poland national team at Euro 2012, an opportunity.

arts.ttl: West Ham vs Arsenal TV channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: Arsenal are due to face West Ham in a 5.30pm kick-off on Saturday, November 30 at the London Stadium in the Premier League. Here, football.london takes a look at the relevant TV info needed for Arsenal's clash against West Ham in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: The 10 Arsenal players walking suspension tightrope ahead of busy Premier League fixture schedule
arts.sum: The Brazilian has already picked up four yellow cards in the league this season, meaning if he were to be booked against West Ham on Saturday, he would be suspended for Arsenal’s clash against Manchester United four days later. In the Premier League Mikel Arteta’s side will play eight times over the next 35 days, including Saturday’s trip to London rivals West Ham United.

arts.ttl: West Ham ready to get rid of player after just 41 first-team appearances
arts.sum: West Ham United are ready to cash in on Maxwel Cornet. The player is currently on loan at Southampton, but he has struggled for regular game time at the newly promoted club.
